title: Desert Bloom Wall Hanging
description: A large-format woven wall hanging inspired by the blooming desert after spring rain. Hand-dyed using marigold and indigo, woven on a custom loom with 100% wool yarn. Each piece is unique — colors may vary slightly due to the natural dyeing process.
careInstructions: Spot clean only. Keep away from direct sunlight to preserve dye colors.

reviews.title: Absolutely stunning
reviews.body: This piece transformed my living room. The colors are even more beautiful in person. Arrived well-packaged and quickly. Elena is a true artist.

reviews.title: Worth every penny
reviews.body: I bought this as a housewarming gift and the recipient cried — in the best way. Incredible craftsmanship.

title: Sunrise Gradient Table Runner
description: A hand-woven table runner with a warm sunrise gradient from deep rust to pale cream. Made with natural cotton on a rigid heddle loom. Perfect for everyday dining or a special occasion.
careInstructions: Hand wash cold, lay flat to dry.

reviews.title: So beautiful
reviews.body: I have it on my farmhouse table and get compliments every time someone visits. The quality is exceptional.

title: Wood-Fired Stoneware Mug
description: A generously sized mug thrown on the wheel and fired in a wood kiln over three days. The ash glaze creates a unique surface of greens, blues, and warm ochres — no two are alike. Holds approximately 14oz. Microwave and dishwasher safe.
careInstructions: Dishwasher safe, though hand washing will preserve the glaze longer. Microwave safe.

reviews.title: My favorite mug ever
reviews.body: I have a collection of handmade mugs and this one has become my daily driver. The weight is perfect and the glaze is stunning.

reviews.title: Great but shipping was slow
reviews.body: The mug itself is gorgeous and worth every cent. Shipping took longer than expected, but Marcus was communicative throughout.

title: Lotus Bloom Embroidered Hoop
description: A 10-inch embroidery hoop featuring a hand-stitched lotus surrounded by Kerala-inspired foliage in jewel tones on natural linen. Over 40 hours of work. Ready to hang as wall art — the hoop is wrapped in matching linen.
careInstructions: Display away from direct sunlight. Do not wet clean — dust gently with a dry soft brush.

reviews.title: A masterpiece
reviews.body: I bought this for my home office and I still stop to look at it every day. The detail is breathtaking. Priya is incredibly talented.

title: Black Walnut Serving Board
description: A hand-planed black walnut charcuterie and serving board with a through-mortise handle. Finished with food-safe beeswax and linseed oil. The live edge is preserved on one side, showcasing the natural beauty of the wood. Sourced from a family-owned mill in western North Carolina.
careInstructions: Hand wash only — never soak or put in dishwasher. Re-oil occasionally with food-safe mineral oil to maintain finish.

reviews.title: Beyond expectations
reviews.body: Ordered one for myself and three as gifts. Everyone is obsessed. The grain pattern on mine is stunning — truly one of a kind.

reviews.title: Heirloom quality
reviews.body: James builds things to last. This board will outlive me and I mean that as the highest compliment.

title: Mjolnir Pendant — Sterling Silver
description: A cold-forged sterling silver pendant inspired by Thor's hammer from Norse mythology. Measures 1.25 inches tall with a hammer-textured surface and a matte finish. Comes on an 18-inch sterling silver chain. Each pendant is made to order and signed on the back.
careInstructions: Store in the provided anti-tarnish pouch. Polish with a silver cloth as needed. Avoid contact with lotions and perfumes.

reviews.title: Wearing it every day
reviews.body: Solid, substantial, beautifully made. Sofia's work is exceptional — you can feel the care in the weight of it.

reviews.title: Great gift
reviews.body: Bought for my partner who is obsessed with Norse mythology. He loved it. Shipping took 9 days but came packaged beautifully.
